# Celectric Redesign, Client Review Summary

## Purpose
Provide a client-facing summary of the current website direction, blog planning, and content delivery approach.

## Current Direction
- Industrial product catalog plus enquiry platform
- Reference structure inspired by Instrumart
- Phase 1 focuses on product discovery, RFQ, and trust building

## Main Navigation
- Products
- Brands
- Industries / Solutions
- Resources
- Blog / Insights
- About
- Contact / Request Quote

## Blog / Insights
Recommended to include because it:
- supports SEO and long-tail search
- builds technical credibility
- helps guide buyers into product and RFQ pages
- creates internal linking to products, brands, and solutions

## Product Pages
Recommended product page sections:
- title and model
- brand
- images
- key specs
- datasheet / document downloads
- related products
- FAQ or short Q&A
- RFQ CTA

## Product Option SEO
- minor options should stay on one main product page
- query param states can be used for variant selection
- only distinct model-level variants should get separate pages

## Document Delivery Rule
Recommended default:
- selected documents should be delivered through secure download links
- links should be time-limited and non-guessable
- email should contain links, not large file attachments

Why:
- avoids attachment limits
- reduces uncontrolled sharing
- supports audit trail and future access rules

## Suggested Phase 1 Scope
- homepage redesign
- navigation restructure
- category pages
- product detail pages
- brand pages
- blog / insights base feature
- RFQ flow
- mobile responsive improvements

## Hosting Recommendation
### Mock / Preview
- Cloudflare Pages
- Budget: RM0

### Production
- Hetzner VPS + Cloudflare
- Budget: about RM30 to RM80 per month
- Domain: about RM60 to RM120 per year

## Summary
This direction keeps the site focused on industrial discovery, enquiry conversion, and SEO growth without overbuilding the first release.
